description: The Valmet MAXUM II is a high-performance process gas chromatograph designed for continuous online analysis of gas and liquid samples. It provides accurate composition analysis for feedstock, intermediate streams, final products, and waste streams in demanding industrial environments. Its modular architecture, parallel chromatography, and multiple detector options deliver high reliability, flexibility, and low maintenance for critical process applications.

description: The Adage Extractive Gas Analytical Solution with Siemens TDLAS combines Siemens' Tunable Diode Laser Absorption Spectroscopy (TDLAS) technology with Adage's extractive heated sample system to deliver fast, highly selective, and accurate gas analysis in demanding industrial applications involving high temperatures, dust, vibration, and corrosive gases. It is ideal where conventional in-situ installations are not feasible.

industries: Oil & Gas | Petrochemical | Chemical | Power | Steel | Cement | Glass | Waste Incineration | Environmental

description: The Siemens OXYMAT 61 is a continuous extractive oxygen gas analyzer that uses the paramagnetic alternating pressure principle for precise oxygen measurement in industrial processes. It is designed for combustion optimization, process control, emissions monitoring, and safety applications, offering high accuracy, excellent long-term stability, and minimal maintenance.

name: FIDAMAT 6
industries: Oil & Gas | Petrochemical | Chemical | Power | Cement | Pharmaceutical | Automotive | Environmental | Wastewater | Gas Production

description: The Siemens FIDAMAT 6 is a continuous flame ionization detector (FID) gas analyzer designed for highly sensitive measurement of total hydrocarbons (THC). It provides reliable online monitoring for process optimization, emissions compliance, solvent recovery, and ultra-pure gas applications, even in corrosive gases, high-moisture environments, and high-boiling hydrocarbon mixtures.
